subject: fix(audit): resolve 11 bugs found in full codebase audit
body:
Four-agent parallel audit of services, components, hooks, and config.
Fixed undefined event emissions, timer leaks, race conditions,
invalid HTML, stale help text, and workspace-scoping bugs.

- Guard emit() with null checks in graphService/viewService/workspaceService
- bulkDeleteNodes: indexed arc queries instead of full table scan
- useToast: clear pending timers on unmount
- seedService: deduplicate concurrent seedIfEmpty() calls
- mergeService: case-insensitive labelsMatch()
- snapshotService: workspace-scoped hasSnapshotForWorkspace()
- DetailPanel: stable key props for property edit rows
- QueryBuilder: span[role=button] replaces nested button
- QueryHelpModal: corrected AND/OR toggle help text
- TimelineView: effectiveSelected useMemo for dataset changes

Tags: audit, bugfix, services, components, hooks
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-audit
Semver: patch
